name: @uptimizr/aframe
description: A-Frame (WebXR) connector for Uptimizr — registers the `uptimizr` component over @uptimizr/three and adds XR controller/gaze capture.
author: Raanan Weber (https://github.com/RaananW)

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && pnpm run bundle && pnpm run bundle:global
scripts.bundle: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=browser --target=es2022 --external:three --external:aframe --minify --legal-comments=none --banner:js="/* @uptimizr/aframe standalone bundle — Apache-2.0. Async-import into any page that already runs A-Frame; it registers the <a-scene uptimizr> component. aframe + three stay external (provided by the host page, never bundled). */" --outfile=dist/uptimizr-aframe.js
scripts.bundle:global: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --format=iife --global-name=UptimizrAframe --platform=browser --target=es2022 --external:three --external:aframe --minify --legal-comments=none --banner:js="/* @uptimizr/aframe standalone bundle (global) — Apache-2.0. Inject via a <script> tag AFTER aframe.min.js; it registers the <a-scene uptimizr> component and exposes window.UptimizrAframe. aframe + three stay external (provided by the host page, never bundled). */" --outfile=dist/uptimizr-aframe.global.js
